name: Mpets Click Training Tool
description: Description 6 x 4 x 1.7 cm Dog Training Clicker with Wrist Strap Durable Light weight Easy to use M-PETS Dog Training CLICKER is a brilliant tool for training your dog using positive reinforcement. > Ergonomic and lightweight design for a comfortable fit in your hand. Comes with an elastic wrist band so you can leave it on your wrist or clip it to your leash or pants. > Button for easy clicking and loud sound to get your dog's attention and become a familiar indicator of a job well done. > Perfect for basic obedience, such as sit, fetch, lie down, stand, roll over, look for the target, etc., and correct wrong behaviours. For effective pet training, ALWAYS reward with a treat after clicking. > The training CLICKER is not only for dogs, it can be used for your cat, bird, chicken,..., and even horse
